title: Production Package Promotion Plan
scope: Documentation/planning only; no runtime behavior, county registration, county enablement, production package, community package, manifest, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, file move/copy, or protected-system changes.

pipeline.purpose: Establish authoritative county boundary, road, crossing, and supporting source inputs before package work proceeds.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Authoritative or accepted source material is documented and sufficient to manufacture a community package.

pipeline.purpose: Convert accepted source data into community-package format without consumer enablement.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Community package exists, is internally consistent, and is ready to feed crossing package generation.

pipeline.purpose: Produce manufactured crossing package for production promotion evaluation.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Crossing package exists and is suitable for production-package build review.

pipeline.purpose: Build the consumer-grade production crossing package without exposing it through runtime registration.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Production package is complete, reviewable, and ready for formal certification.

pipeline.purpose: Certify the production package before manifest consideration.
verification: required checks passed or documented as blocked
pipeline.exitCriteria: Certification is complete and explicitly authorizes advancement to production manifest update planning.

pipeline.purpose: Register the certified production package in the production package manifest.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Production manifest contains the county package entry and the entry is validated.

pipeline.purpose: Install or expose production package assets within the application repository without automatically enabling runtime consumers.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Application repository contains the county production package assets in the expected location.

pipeline.purpose: Register the county with runtime county registries.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Runtime registration is complete and runtime validation passes.

pipeline.purpose: Make the registered county discoverable through county-aware search paths.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Search integration validates for the county and regression checks pass for existing counties.

pipeline.purpose: Enable county-aware filtering, incident context, and awareness presentation.
verification: awareness filtering includes county only when intended
pipeline.exitCriteria: Awareness validation passes and county behavior is ready for consumer validation.

pipeline.purpose: Confirm the county is fully available to consumers.
pipeline.exitCriteria: Consumer validation completes and the county is declared available.

promotionChecklist: Source data accepted and provenance documented
Community package structure and schema validated

promotionGates.mandatoryVerification: Source provenance, boundary scope, road suitability, and source limitations documented
Community package exists, has expected county identity, and passes structure/schema review
promotionGates.exitRequirement: Community package eligible for crossing generation

promotionGates.mandatoryVerification: Crossing package exists, passes county association and geometry/road checks, and has no fatal validation issues
promotionGates.exitRequirement: Crossing package eligible for production build

promotionGates.mandatoryVerification: Production package exists, metadata and crossing inventory match expectations, and validation evidence is present
Certification complete, evidence recorded, and promotion risk accepted
Manifest entry authorized, matches certified metadata, and validates without unrelated changes
Application assets exist and no runtime/search/awareness enablement occurred prematurely
Runtime registry includes county, production crossing runtime validates, and existing registered counties unaffected
Search resolves county correctly and existing county search behavior unchanged
Awareness filtering validates, protected systems clear, and consumer scenarios pass
promotionGates.exitRequirement: County may be declared consumer available

chambersCaseStudy.currentObservedStage: Application repository installed but not enabled
chambersCaseStudy.promotionReadiness: Nearest observed future candidate, but not consumer ready until certification, runtime, search, awareness, and consumer validation gates are completed under separate authorization.

recommendedCountyEnablementOrder.rationale: Closest to promotion based on observed production package, manifest presence, and application installation.
Application assets present; resolve road dataset and production packaging before enablement.
Application assets present and manufacturing exists; requires production package onward.
Application assets present but likely higher scale/risk; defer until smaller candidates validate process.
Nearby manufactured counties with community and crossing packages.
Regional expansion group requiring production packaging and later gates.
Manufactured inland expansion group requiring full promotion.
Remaining manufactured expansion group requiring full promotion.

testing.observation: PowerShell is unavailable in this environment; toolkit execution could not be performed.
